name: Fluffy Meat Loaf
recipeIngredient: 3 medium bread slices, torn in pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Mix all ingredients thoroughly in a large bowl.
3. Place mixture into a greased baking dish and bake for 1 hour and 30 minutes, or until done.
4. Serve hot or cold. For a ketchup-topped loaf, spread 3 tablespoons on top before baking.
